quests.name: Angler
quests.requirements: Collect one of each fish species (12 total) and build a display for your collection in a location of your choosing, using item stands and signs with each species' name to label them.

quests.name: Backpacking
quests.requirements: Complete a group hike through the Valheim wilderness with other Rangers. Take plenty of screenshots along the way, and write a story about your adventure together. *Limited to 30 minutes Field Service / era
quests.evidence_note: 4 screenshots of the group hike in progress

quests.name: Canoeing
quests.requirements: Complete a group sail with other Rangers. Take plenty of screenshots along the way, and write a story of your adventure at sea. *Limited to 30 minutes Field Service / era
quests.evidence_note: 4 screenshots of the group sail in progress
quests.bot_command: /ranger badge badge_name:Canoeing participants:(Tag all participants) badge_notes:(Short Story of the trip) image: image2: image3: image4:

quests.name: Comfy Fried Chicken
quests.requirements:
Use the environment to "naturally cook" a live chicken or hen in the ashlands!  Show the chicken/hen alive in the ashlands and then show either it's drops in the lava or it *poof*-ing in the lava.  
Remove ALL built structures after completing and follow all Comfy rules about building in the Ashlands.
Hint: Screen Recording may be easier than screenshots here.  It's not required, but it might help you show that chicken cooking.
Hint 2: Chickens don't drop anything, so you should REALLY record if you want to catch the little yella fella POOF
quests.evidence_note: 2 screenshots or recording, 1 of the live chicken/hen in the ashlands, and 1 of the POOF or of its drops in lava
quests.bot_command: /ranger_badge badge_name: Comfy Fried Chicken image: image:

quests.name: Thin the Herd
quests.requirements: The forest is teeming with life and depleting the natural resources. Help restore balance to the ecosystem by delivering 2 stacks each of the following meat to Ranger HQ or the turn-in chests at your Ranger Cabin: Bear, Boar, Deer, Wolf, and Lox.

quests.name: Wildlife
quests.requirements: Become one with nature, and put your sneak skill to the test as you observe the local wildlife. You'll need to get as close as possible to a wild Bear, Boar, Deer, Hare, Lox, Neck, and Wolf. Take a screenshot crouching next to each animal in its natural habitat before it becomes alerted to your presence.
quests.evidence_note: 7 screenshots of you being sneaky, one with each listed animal
quests.bot_command: /ranger badge badge_name:Wildlife image: image2: image3: image4: image5: image6: image7:

quests.name: Wildtender
quests.requirements: Venture into the wilderness with your hoe & cultivator and plant 3 seed-carrots in the Black Forest, 3 seed-turnips in the Swamp, and 3 seed-onions in the Plains.  SEED-veggies, not the actual veggies!

quests.name: Bearly an Inconvenience
quests.requirements:
Locate a Bear or a Vile in the wild, then construct & decorate a cave-like home in which it can live, meaning the home is to be enclosed above and on 3 sides, with a bear/vile inside.  You may use natural terrain and/or Stone/Black Marble/Grausten to build it.  Include a sign with your name(s) and the date of construction, and submit a screenshot of the animal in its beautiful new home.
Bear puns highly recommended
quests.evidence_note: Screenshot of a bear or a vile in its decorated cave enclosure
quests.bot_command: /ranger badge badge_name:Bearly an Inconvenience participants:(Tag all participants) image:

quests.name: Hunting Spirits
quests.requirements: Gather your allies and slay the tormented spirits of the Swamp, so that they may find peace and the land can begin to heal. Two or more Rangers may claim this badge by submitting a screenshot of their battle with a Wraith and bringing 5 chains per person to the turn-in chests at HQ or your Ranger Cabin.

quests.name: Comfy Ranger
quests.requirements: Perform a good deed for a player who has not yet ranked up to Scout, using your knowledge of the natural world and your skills as a Ranger. Take time to help them find resources, set up a farm, tame an animal, complete a quest, or some other act of service. Ask what they need help with, and offer your assistance for nothing in return. Let the player know they can thank you in the Rangers' channel.
quests.bot_command: /ranger badge badge_name:Comfy Ranger badge_notes:(link to thank-you post in #🌲-rangerᵗʰᵉ⁻ᵖʳᵉˢᵉʳᵛᵉ)

quests.name: God-Firs
quests.requirements:
Hidden throughout the Comfy wilderness, the God-Firs grow—even as the blight continues to spread. Seek out five of these sacred evergreen trees, each dedicated to a different god. Pay your respects with an offering, if you wish. Their locations are known only to those who look.

Submit screenshots of 5 different God-Firs in #🏹-ranger-submissions with god names clearly visible.
quests.bot_command: /ranger badge badge_name:God-Firs image: image2: image3: image4: image5:

quests.name: Beekeeping
quests.requirements:
A poison curse has begun to seep through the wilderness, rotting the land and driving many creatures from their homes. Among the displaced are honeybees, whose hives have collapsed under the spreading blight. To protect them, Rangers have established a secret sanctuary in a secluded forest, somewhere north-west of the Deer God's domain...but still east of Spawn :)

Tend the hives at the Lost Bees Refuge and deliver any honey you gather to the donation chest at the Best West Farm. If the chest is full, you may keep the excess—the bees will understand.

Submit 2 screenshots in #🏹-ranger-submissions:
• One showing “The Bees are Happy!” at the refuge
• One showing the stocked honey chest at Best West
quests.bot_command: /ranger badge badge_name:Beekeeping image: image2:

quests.name: Wolf Tracks
quests.requirements:
The Rangers Guild has adopted a pack of 5 local wolves displaced by the spreading curse. Prospective wardens are tasked to venture in, around, and through HQ to perform regular checks on the protected animals' well-being.

Submit screenshots of all 5 wolves with their names clearly shown in #🏹-ranger-submissions and the guild will reward your good stewardship.

Report any concerns for the safety of our wolves to a Ranger Guildmaster.
quests.bot_command: /ranger badge badge_name:Wolf Tracks image: image2: image3: image4: image5:

quests.name: Had to Get Away
quests.requirements:
A certain Ranger from our past had a home near our HQ.  When we went to go say "hi" this era, we found the hovel empty.  The Ranger had some other campsites throughout the world.
Locate one of these campsites, explore it, and find the clue left within to help decipher what may have happened to this Lost Ranger.

[Expected difficulty: Silver +]

#🏹-ranger-submissions find the hidden letter in the quest location and screen shot it.
quests.bot_command: /ranger badge badge_name:Had to Get Away image:

quests.name: All I Ever Wanted
quests.requirements:
Rescue the Lost Ranger.
 
[Expected Difficuty: Carapace +]

#🏹-ranger-submissions instructions provided in-game at the end of the quest.
